name: Easy Elegant Easter Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl of an electric mixer, cream the butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add the vanilla and sweetened condensed milk and beat until blended.
3. Gradually add two cups of confectioners' sugar and beat until blended.
4. Continue adding two additional cups of confectioners' sugar and beat with the mixer until blended.
5. If using a heavy-duty mixer, it may be possible to blend in the remaining sugar; otherwise, remove the bowl from the mixer stand and use a wooden spoon to beat in the remaining sugar.
6. Remove the mixture from the bowl onto a clean counter surface and knead with your hands if necessary to make a smooth, fondant consistency.
7. Pinch off about two tablespoons of the fondant and roll it between your hands to form a smooth egg shape, slightly narrower at one end.
8. Place each egg on a cookie sheet covered with wax paper.
9. Refrigerate for a few hours or overnight to firm and chill before dipping in chocolate as directed in the recipe.
10. For coconut cream eggs, add moist, sweetened coconut to the fondant to make coconut cream eggs.
11. For peanut butter eggs, make a small yolk of about one tablespoon peanut butter and wrap it in a thin layer of fondant. Shape as directed for plain eggs and coat with chocolate.
